nameMeanings.name: Alleyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Chantal, Julien, Marcell.

English: variant of   Allen  . This is an old-fashioned spelling, already established as a surname in England in Tudor times. Today this surname is found mainly in the West Indies, especially Barbados.

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Alleyne Gent. of Thaxted was born about 1460, in Thaxted, Essex, England. He had at least 7 sons and 4 daughters with Agnes Pelesholle. He died in 1508, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Alleyne Gent. of Thaxted est né environ 1460, à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles avec Agnes Pelesholle. Il est décédé en 1508, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Alleyne Gent. of Thaxted wurde um 1460 in Thaxted, Essex, England geboren. Er hatte mit Agnes Pelesholle mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1508 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Alleyne Gent. of Thaxted è nato il circa 1460 nel Thaxted, Essex, England. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie con Agnes Pelesholle. Morì nel 1508, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Alleyne Gent. of Thaxtedは約1460年にイギリスエセックスサクステドで生まれた。彼はAgnes Pelesholleとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1508年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Alleyne Gent. of Thaxted(은)는 대략 1460년 영국 에세스 스액테드에서 태어났다. 그는 Agnes Pelesholle(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Alleyne Gent. of Thaxted nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas com Agnes Pelesholle. Ele faleceu em 1508, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Alleyne Gent. of Thaxted родился около 1460 г. в местности такстед, эссекс, Англия. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери от Agnes Pelesholle. Он умер в 1508 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Alleyne Gent. of Thaxted nació aproximadamente 1460, en Thaxted, Essex, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas con Agnes Pelesholle. Murió en 1508, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
